name: Falafel
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil to 350 degrees in a heavy deep skillet or deep fryer.
2. Process chick peas until smooth. Add chicken broth and bread crumbs, pulsing to mix.
3. Pour mixture into a bowl. Stir in flour, egg, tahini, cumin, marjoram, paprika, lemon juice, garlic, and parsley.
4. Form the mixture into 2-inch balls. Coat with extra flour.
5. Deep fry balls, a few at a time, until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
6. Assemble in pita pockets with shredded lettuce, topped with tomatoes and scallions.
